topics: Automotive Marketing
Overview of Automotive Industry - Understanding the Structure, Evolution and Major Players in the Automotive Industry
Market Trends and Challenges - Analysing Current Trends, Challenges and Opportunities Shaping the Automotive Market
Fundamentals of Marketing - Introduction to Marketing Concepts and Principles with a Focus on Their Application in the Automotive Sector
Consumer Behaviour in the Automotive Sector - Understanding Consumer Preferences, Decision Making Processes and Buying Behaviour Specific to the Automotive Market
Market Segmentation and Targeting - Techniques for Segmenting Automotive Markets Based on Demographic, Psychographic and Behavioural Factors, Strategies for Targeting Specific Customer Segments
Automotive Product Management
Product Lifecycle Management - Understanding the Stages of the Automotive Product Lifecycle and Strategies for Managing Products at Each Stage
New Product Development - Techniques and Processes for Developing New Automotive Products, Including Market Research, Concept Development and Product Testing
Brand Management - Importance of Branding in the Automotive Industry, Brand Positioning Strategies and Building Brand Equity
Product Positioning and Differentiation - Strategies for Positioning Automotive Products in the Market and Creating Points of Differentiation from Competitors
Quality Management in Automotive Sector - Ensuring Quality Standards in Automotive Products and Services and Their Impact on Marketing Strategies
Automotive Marketing Communications

Integrated Marketing Communications - Overview of Marketing Communication Tools and Channels Used in the Automotive Industry, Including Advertising, Public Relations, Sales Promotion and Digital Marketing
Advertising and Media Planning - Planning and Executing Advertising Campaigns for Automotive Products, Including Media Selection, Message Development and Campaign Evaluation
Digital Marketing Strategies - Leveraging Digital Channels Such as Social Media, Search Engine Marketing and Content Marketing to Reach and Engage Automotive Consumers

Customer Relationship Management (CRM) - Importance of CRM in Automotive Marketing, Strategies for Building and Maintaining Customer Relationships, and Leveraging Customer Data for Personalized Marketing
Brand Activation and Sponsorship - Implementing Brand Activation Strategies and Leveraging Sponsorship Opportunities to Enhance Brand Visibility and Consumer Engagement
Automotive Retailing
Overview of Automotive Retailing Channels - Including Dealerships, Online Sales Platforms and Direct-to-Consumer Models
Sales Management - Techniques for Managing Automotive Sales Teams, Setting Sales Targets and Developing Sales Strategies
Channel Management - Strategies for Managing Distribution Channels in the Automotive Industry, Including Dealer Networks, Franchise Agreements and Channel Conflict Resolution
After-Sales Service and Support - Importance of After-Sales Service in Automotive Marketing, Strategies for Enhancing Customer Satisfaction and Loyalty Through Service and Support Initiatives

Legal and Ethical Issues in Automotive Marketing - Understanding Legal and Ethical Considerations in Automotive Marketing Practices, Including Advertising Regulations, Consumer Protection Laws, and Environmental Responsibilities
